paragraph.text: FMGE preparation comes with an overwhelming pressure, a vast syllabus, and limited time. That’s exactly why we built Version XI to make concepts stick.

data.title: Why This is the Only FMGE Prep You Need!

features.title: Revise Smarter, Not Longer
features.subtitle: Streamline your prep with focused video lectures mapped to past FMGE questions. Highlighting common pitfalls and high-yield topics, it helps you retain more while cutting down unnecessary study time.

features.title: Connect the Dots
features.subtitle: Integrated essentials bring overlapping concepts together so you see the bigger picture. Reduce repetition, lighten your mental load, and strengthen your understanding for those tricky clinical questions.

features.title: Anatomy That Stays With You
features.subtitle: Watch real cadaver dissections to make anatomy concrete. Recognize structures instantly, improve cross-section recall, and never get confused between similar-looking parts again.

features.title: High-Yield Insights at a Glance
features.subtitle: Quick, one-page printed summaries condense only what really matters. Perfect for fast revisions anywhere, they make remembering repeatedly tested concepts effortless.

features.title: Practice That Prepares You for Anything
features.subtitle: Our fully revamped QBank covers every type of question. With 18,500 questions reflecting current trends, it helps you sharpen accuracy, speed, and confidence under pressure.

features.title: Full-Length Tests for Exam Simulation
features.subtitle: Our test series simulates the real exam environment, helping you assess your preparation and refine your strategy. With full-length tests, you can evaluate your performance across all subjects.

testimonial.title: I used to get more negatives in PrepLadder GTs, but analyzing them helped me sharpen my approach. That’s what gave me the edge in the real exam.
testimonial.name: Dr. Sanjay

testimonial.title: PrepLadder’s QBank, using bookmarks and highlights to quickly revise weak areas. I gave GTs regularly, emphasizing that consistency is key: “Don’t fear low scores in GTs. They are learning experiences, not the final result. Even toppers begin with low scores.”
testimonial.name: Dr. Nishid

testimonial.title: Every single Medicine question in FMGE was from your Medicine notes, Sir. I didn’t get a single one wrong. Calling PrepLadder’s QBank aligned with real exam questions
testimonial.name: Dr. Sahed

testimonial.title: PrepLadder’s Rapid Revision and especially video solutions in GTs: “A 2-minute video explanation clarified concepts better than pages of text.”
testimonial.name: Dr. Jyotiprakash

testimonial.title: Credits to Dr. Preeti Sharma for Patho & Micro mnemonics, and Dr. Ankit Kumar for simplifying Pharma with Medicine.
testimonial.name: Dr. Sakshi

testimonial.title: One of the good things about PrepLadder GTs is that they use PYQs to make new questions around the same topic, and that helps you think in the way you actually need to during the exam
testimonial.name: Dr. Abhinav

testimonial.title: So many INI-CET questions came from what was highlighted in the PrepLadder sessions.
testimonial.name: Dr. Sumeet

testimonial.title: GT analysis is extremely important. PrepLadder’s color coding and option-wise explanation helped me understand why other options were wrong, which is crucial in INI-CET, where elimination plays a major role
testimonial.name: Dr. Anjali

testimonial.title: That topic-wise PYQ feature helped me a lot in improving my understanding and exam pattern awareness.
testimonial.name: Dr. Soham

testimonial.title: After completing my second revision, I took the next PrepLadder GT, and my score improved
testimonial.name: Dr. Manav

faqArr.name: What’s new in Version XI?
faqArr.text:
Version XI is a complete upgrade focused on high-yield learning and faster recall. It includes:
  • 280+ Hours of entirely new Rapid Revision videos (English & Hinglish)
  • 50+ Hrs of Integrated Essentials for system-wise learning
  • 20 Hrs of Real cadaver dissection videos
  • Revamped QBank with 5000+ new questions on missing topics + topper review
  • Printed Summary Charts for last-minute revision
  • SPARK – an intelligent spaced-repetition flashcard system

faqArr.name: When will Version XI content go LIVE?
faqArr.text: Version XI content goes live on 12th April 2026.

faqArr.name: What is the pre-booking offer, and till what date is it available?
faqArr.text: Prebooking starts on 23rd February and is available till 28th February.

faqArr.name: What will I get till 12th April?
faqArr.text: Until launch, you will have access to existing Version X content. You will be able to see demo videos of all the new assets in your current version.

faqArr.name: Who should buy Version XI?
faqArr.text: Version XI is ideal for NEET PG, INI-CET, and FMGE aspirants who want a more retention-focused, exam-aligned prep system.

faqArr.name: Why should I switch from Version X to Version XI?
faqArr.text: Version X helped you cover content. Version XI helps that content convert into recall. You get all-new Rapid Revision (not reused), PYQ-tagged learning to prioritise what repeats, integrated system-wise understanding to reduce overlap, smarter recall tools, and a QBank aligned to the current exam pattern. If your goal is better accuracy and rank improvement, Version XI is the upgrade.

faqArr.name: Will my progress be maintained if I switch to Version XI?
faqArr.text: Yes, There will be option to switch between versions. You progress and analytics will be retained in your current version.

faqArr.name: Will I get access to live classes with Version XI?
faqArr.text: Version XI is primarily a recorded, high-yield learning ecosystem. LIVE classes (RESOLVE) are available via the Super ELITE Plan as an add-on.

faqArr.name: What has changed in the main videos?
faqArr.text: There are 10% changes made to main videos . Accordingly we have updated the hard copy notes. These videos were freshly recorded in version x so major updates are not done.

faqArr.name: When will I get notes for Version XI?
faqArr.text: We will inform you when the booking starts for the same. We will start the dispatch in second week of april (tentatively)

faqArr.name: When will I get notes for Rapid Revision?
faqArr.text: We will inform you when the booking starts for the same. We will start the dispatch in fourth week of April (tentatively)
